src: Flutter Launcher Icons - A package which simplifies the task of updating your Flutter app's launcher icon. Fully flexible, allowing you to choose what platform you wish to update the launcher icon for and if you want, the option to keep your old launcher icon in case you want to revert back sometime in the future. Maintainer: @MarkOSullivan94
ja: Flutter Launcher Icons — Flutter アプリのランチャーアイコン更新作業を簡素化するパッケージ。更新対象プラットフォームの選択や旧アイコンの保持オプションなど、完全に柔軟な設定が可能です。メンテナー: @MarkOSullivan94
